requirement_topic.en: INDOCAL / NORDOM Safety Conformity — IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Evidence
requirement_topic.zh: INDOCAL / NORDOM安全合格评定——IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2证据
requirement_topic.zht: INDOCAL / NORDOM安全合格評定——IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2證據

summary.en: The Dominican Republic standards and conformity context is led by INDOCAL, which publishes Dominican standards (NORDOM), participates in international standardization, and provides product/process/service certification and conformity services. For PV inverters, the safety evidence normally expected in IEC-based procurement and conformity files is IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 for power converters used in photovoltaic systems. Exporters should confirm with INDOCAL, the importer, the SIE/distributor project reviewer, and the project owner whether IEC 62109 reports or certificates are accepted directly, adopted through NORDOM, or need a local conformity step.
summary.zh: 多米尼加共和国标准和合格评定体系由INDOCAL主导，INDOCAL发布多米尼加标准（NORDOM）、参与国际标准化，并提供产品/过程/服务认证及合格评定服务。对于光伏逆变器，IEC体系采购和合格评定文件通常要求IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2作为光伏系统用功率变换器安全证据。出口商应向INDOCAL、进口商、SIE/配电公司项目审查方和项目业主确认IEC 62109报告或证书是可直接接受、通过NORDOM采纳，还是需要本地合格评定步骤。
summary.zht: 多明尼加共和國標準和合格評定體系由INDOCAL主導，INDOCAL發布多明尼加標準（NORDOM）、參與國際標準化，並提供產品/過程/服務認證及合格評定服務。對於光伏逆變器，IEC體系採購和合格評定文件通常要求IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2作為光伏系統用功率轉換器安全證據。出口商應向INDOCAL、進口商、SIE/配電公司項目審查方和項目業主確認IEC 62109報告或證書是可直接接受、通過NORDOM採納，還是需要本地合格評定步驟。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
INDOCAL NORDOM standards and product/process/service conformity services

summary.en: China PV inverter safety evidence is commonly based on GB/T 37408 and voluntary CQC/CGC or laboratory files. It may support due diligence, but it is not the same as IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence and should not be represented as automatically accepted by INDOCAL, SIE, distributors, or Dominican project owners.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器安全证据通常基于GB/T 37408及自愿性CQC/CGC或实验室文件。该类文件可支持尽调，但不等同于IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证据，不应声称会被INDOCAL、SIE、配电公司或多米尼加项目业主自动接受。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器安全證據通常基於GB/T 37408及自願性CQC/CGC或實驗室文件。該類文件可支持盡調，但不等同於IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證據，不應聲稱會被INDOCAL、SIE、配電公司或多明尼加項目業主自動接受。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: A China domestic safety certificate alone is not enough to show Dominican Republic IEC/NORDOM conformity. Exporters should obtain IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test reports or certificates for the exact model or family, map the model variants and firmware versions supplied to the Dominican Republic, and confirm whether INDOCAL or the project requires additional local conformity documentation.
gap.zh: 差距：仅有中国国内安全证书不足以证明符合多米尼加共和国IEC/NORDOM合格评定要求。出口商应取得涵盖准确型号或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验报告或证书，映射供应多米尼加共和国的型号变体和固件版本，并确认INDOCAL或项目是否要求额外本地合格评定文件。
gap.zht: 差距：僅有中國國內安全證書不足以證明符合多明尼加共和國IEC/NORDOM合格評定要求。出口商應取得涵蓋準確型號或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗報告或證書，映射供應多明尼加共和國的型號變體和韌體版本，並確認INDOCAL或項目是否要求額外本地合格評定文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice where INDOCAL/NORDOM conformity, SIE/distributor interconnection, procurement specifications, insurer review, or project-owner acceptance requires IEC inverter safety evidence
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary/domestic evidence; GB/T-based China certification is not automatically accepted as IEC 62109 evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Plan around IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence and confirm the INDOCAL/NORDOM conformity route before shipment. China GB/T 37408 safety evidence can support the file but should not be treated as automatic Dominican Republic acceptance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应围绕IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据制定计划，并在出货前确认INDOCAL/NORDOM合格评定路径。中国GB/T 37408安全证据可支持文件包，但不应被视为多米尼加共和国自动接受。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應圍繞IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據制定計畫，並在出貨前確認INDOCAL/NORDOM合格評定路徑。中國GB/T 37408安全證據可支持文件包，但不應被視為多明尼加共和國自動接受。
